long_description:
base-net-sw upgrade failed on the node dal1-qz6-sr3-rk106-s36, and the node is in costed-out state, to re-try the upgrade we need to cost-in the edge node
Incident source: upgrade failed via pipeline on one edge - Varun Reddy Gangidi
short_description: Need to cost-in edge node dal1-qz6-sr3-rk106-s36
close_notes:
INC Resolution

All Timestamps must be in UTC)
### Brief Summary of the issue: 
Impacted Env(s): us-south-ngdc-test-3 ZONE
IPOps SME Escalated: 
Reason of escalation to Service Team:
Cause Code: is-sdn EDGE MPLS Label
Runbooks used to resolve: Not Needed

current_status_next_steps:
gt dal1-qz6-sr3-rk106-s36
# /usr/local/gobgp/gobgp -p 50555 policy

# sudo /usr/local/fabcon/ccc get_iobricks_status

Verify the edge is costed-in
